name: Remmina
description: Remote access screen and file sharing
compose:
name: slashnode-remmina
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/remmina:1.4.35
    container_name: remmina
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8764:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-remmina_server_data-config
